creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227174
"git diff" to update the port

- Update 0.08 -> 0.09
- Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/TOKUHIROM/FCGI-Client-0.09/source/Changes
- request maintainership as Jun Kuriyama seems to be absent for long
- remove dep from devel/p5-Any-Moose (deprecated by its upstream) 
	in favour of devel/p5-Moo
- add LICENSE
- switch to USE_PERL5=modbuildtiny

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.17.1
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
